semantic.role: Architecture constraint documentation for the ArchSpine mirror system layered architecture.
responsibilities: Defining import and dependency boundaries for CLI, services, core, tasks, engines, and infra layers.
Specifying severity levels and rationales for each architectural rule.
Guiding contributors on maintaining clean separation of concerns.
outOfScope: Detailed implementation guidelines for individual modules.
Non-structural coding standards or style guides.
Project vision or user-facing feature documentation.

English.purpose: To enforce a reusable, testable, and maintainable layered architecture in the ArchSpine project by defining explicit dependency constraints for each architectural layer.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers and contributors to the ArchSpine mirror system. It provides the architectural rules that must be followed when modifying code in any of the defined layers. Understanding these constraints is essential to prevent architectural erosion and ensure the system remains modular.
key_takeaways: CLI modules must remain thin entrypoints and not absorb logic from deeper layers.
Services orchestrate but must not mix view-specific logic into the infra layer.
Core pipeline is independent of CLI and provides stable contracts.
Tasks focus on stage work without taking over CLI or unrelated services.
Engines provide reusable analysis with no dependency on CLI or services.
Infra modules should expose stable facades to hide implementation details.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 为了确保 ArchSpine 系统的分层架构可复用、可测试且易于维护，本文档为每一层定义了明确的依赖约束规则。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向 ArchSpine 镜像系统的所有开发者和贡献者。它列出了在修改任何定义层代码时必须遵守的架构规则。理解这些约束对于防止架构腐化、保持系统的模块化至关重要。
key_takeaways: CLI 模块应保持为薄入口点，不得吸收来自更深层次的逻辑。
服务层负责编排，但不得将视图特定逻辑混入基础设施层。
核心管道与 CLI 无关，提供稳定的契约。
任务模块专注于阶段工作，不接管 CLI 或无关的服务编排。
引擎提供可复用的分析逻辑，不依赖 CLI 或服务层的编排。
基础设施模块应暴露稳定的外观，隐藏实现细节。
